case_title: LUCKY CHANCES, INC. VS. NICHOLAS J. KOLICH

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER LUCKY CHANCES, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT KOLICH, NICHOLAS J. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARB AWARD;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER LUCKY CHANCES, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-11-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER LUCKY CHANCES, INCORPORATED'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-11-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
